query:
-- Final verification
SELECT 'Ledger' as type, availableCash, sessionId FROM paperLedger WHERE userId = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'OpenPositions' as type, COUNT(*) as val, 0 FROM paperPositions WHERE userId = 1 AND status = 'open'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'RecentTrades_30d' as type, COUNT(*) as val, 0 FROM paperTrades WHERE userId = 1 AND closedAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY);
